narrative:
Springfield Twp A (precinct in Summit County) has 959 registered voters, with 61.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
